project: StillaTrends - Premium SaaS Creator Intelligence Platform
summary: Comprehensive UI redesign featuring premium glassmorphism bubble-style features section with MVP-aligned functionality, enhanced branding with logo integration, and consistent design language across all sections.

features_section_redesign.description: 5 interactive feature bubbles with glassmorphism effect, gradient glow on hover, and smooth animations

features_list.title: Daily Trends
features_list.value_prop: Get personalized trend recommendations every morning to stay ahead of the curve

features_list.title: Weekly Insights
features_list.value_prop: Comprehensive performance metrics and growth analysis delivered to your dashboard

features_list.title: Multi-Platform
features_list.value_prop: Coverage across TikTok, YouTube, X, Threads, and Facebook in one unified platform

features_list.title: Personalized
features_list.value_prop: AI-powered recommendations tailored specifically to your content niche and audience

features_list.title: Dashboard Delivery
features_list.value_prop: All insights, trends, and analytics delivered through a beautiful, intuitive interface

bubble_specifications.background: Glassmorphism - semi-transparent white with backdrop blur
bubble_specifications.shadows: Subtle drop shadow, enhanced on hover to shadow-2xl

layout.mobile: grid grid-cols-2 with 2 bubbles per row
layout.tablet: grid grid-cols-3 with 3 bubbles per row
layout.desktop: grid grid-cols-5 with 5 bubbles per row

hover_effects.scale: hover:scale-110 (increased from 1.05 for more dramatic effect)
hover_effects.gradient_overlay: Gradient overlay appears with opacity-15 on hover
hover_effects.glow: Animated gradient glow effect at -z-10 layer

accessibility.aria_label: Each bubble is keyboard accessible with proper focus indicators
accessibility.semantic_html: Proper heading hierarchy (h3 for feature titles)
accessibility.contrast: WCAG AAA compliant - all text meets minimum contrast ratios

logo.design_style: Modern flowing curves with gradient blend

usage.favicon: 32x32px favicon in header and browser tab

gradient_system.usage: Applied to CTAs, feature cards, text highlights

key_characteristics: Subtle drop shadows that intensify on hover
Smooth cubic-bezier easing for all animations

changes: Logo now displays with brand gradient on text
Logo scales on hover for interactive feedback
Redesigned from circular to rounded-square bubbles

hero_section.consistency: Glassmorphism style, gradient text, matched CTA buttons

pricing_section.recommendation: Follow same glassmorphism pattern and color scheme

dashboard.recommendation: Apply same color palette and glassmorphism to dashboard cards

auth_pages.recommendation: Use same gradient buttons and glassmorphic form containers

files_modified: /lib/design-specs.json - Updated feature list with new titles and improved color mapping
performance_considerations: Backdrop blur optimized for modern browsers
Image lazy loading on logo (priority attribute set)
No layout shifts on hover (transform-based animations)
browser_compatibility: Mobile browsers: iOS Safari 15+, Chrome 100+, Firefox 103+
dark_mode_support: All colors automatically adjust in dark mode
Glassmorphic glass remains visible in dark theme
Gradient colors adapted for dark backgrounds

immediate: Review the live preview to ensure branding matches your vision
Test hover effects and interactions on mobile devices
Verify favicon displays correctly in browser tabs
short_term: Apply same glassmorphism style to pricing cards
Enhance dashboard with matching color scheme
Create consistent button styles across all pages
future_enhancements: Add interactive feature demos on hover
Implement parallax scrolling on hero section
Create feature tooltips with more detailed descriptions
Add animated counters for social proof stats
Implement smooth scroll anchoring for navigation links
